# Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

This is a **Call of Cthulhu (CoC) 6th Edition** tabletop RPG reference repository. It contains Chinese translations of the rulebook and TRPG scenario modules. This is a pure content/documentation project — there is no application code, build system, or tests.

## Repository Structure

- `rule/` — Chinese translation of the CoC 6th edition rulebook, organized by chapter (numbered `00_` through `10_`). The `README.md` serves as the table of contents.
- `models/` — TRPG scenario modules (currently contains a Japanese-language escape-room scenario).

## Content Conventions

- Rulebook chapters use numbered prefixes (`00_`, `01_`, etc.) for ordering.
- The rulebook content is in **Simplified Chinese**; scenario content in `models/` may be in **Japanese**.
- When editing or adding content, match the language of the surrounding files.
- Markdown is used throughout. Maintain consistent heading levels within each file.

## Key Terminology

CoC-specific terms follow established Chinese TRPG translation conventions. Refer to `rule/07_译名表.md` for the official translation table mapping English terms to Chinese equivalents. Use this table when adding or editing rule content to maintain terminology consistency.
